description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a flat roof and multiple interconnected volumes, creating a dynamic and open layout. The exterior is primarily composed of light-colored stone or concrete, complemented by large glass windows and green landscaping elements, including several trees and shrubs integrated into the property. The front facade includes a driveway with two parked cars, leading to a recessed main entrance flanked by tall windows and greenery. The rear and side elevations reveal private patios, terraces, and garden spaces, some partially enclosed by low walls for privacy. The house appears to have a single story, with a focus on open-plan living and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with clean lines and a harmonious blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and integrated landscaping, featuring stone or concrete exteriors and open-plan living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with two cars, and prominent landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting private patios, garden spaces, and the integration of greenery along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, enclosed garden areas, and extensive use of glass and stone materials.
description_view_3: Angled side view revealing additional entry points, terraces, and the relationship between the house and the surrounding landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with large glass doors, flanked by tall windows and landscaped planters, accessible via a driveway.
